prompt: Ultima Online HD style, ancient weathered river-crossing terrain in strict orthographic military-plan view, with a winding river, eroded stone paving fragments, mossy foundation traces, worn earth, gravel banks, embedded rocks and sparse low weeds. Preserve the supplied river channel, shoreline and elevation; add only subtle ground-level ruin traces that could belong to a long-decayed civilization. High-definition hand-painted fantasy RPG terrain, soft overcast light, player walking scale, no standing walls, buildings, giant props, tile seams or symmetry.
